# Circadia

> AI-powered nutrition, hydration, and recovery planning for night shift workers. Build personalized shift schedules with meal timing, caffeine cutoffs, and decompression routines.

Circadia helps people who work overnight stay fueled, hydrated, and energized. It generates a timeline of meals, drinks, movement, and rest tuned to each shift, and offers a Pro tier with downloadable LunarFuel/Blackout protocols.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Configure a shift and generate a personalized fueling timeline.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Circadia team with questions or feedback.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Circadia collects, processes, and protects user data (GDPR/CCPA).
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms of use and the medical disclaimer for AI-generated nutrition advice.
